== Notes for [[Item:Q117100|Q117100]] ==

Freira em Lorvao ou Arouca
Nobiliarios das familias de Portugal
Felgueiras Gayo
Carvalhos de Basto
2nda edicao Braga 1989
P Vol I pg 543
Azevedos

Nobiliarios das familias de Portugal
Felgueiras Gayo
Carvalhos de Basto
2nda edicao Braga 1989
P Vol I pg 543
Azevedos

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
